feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Like I lived my whole life before the first light
entry.summary:
Author: Once_Im_Reborn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,866Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 125

Summary: Something was wrong. Not the “the world is ending, and we’re all going to die” sort of wrong, but an odd, humming some kind of wrong that Merlin could feel threading through the halls of Camelot like an intruder. He reached out with his magic more than once, trying to taste the disturbance, but nothing tugged back. Nothing whispered danger. Nothing even shimmered suspiciously. Still…Something felt off. As if certain people were keeping very specific secrets. Important secrets. Normally, that would have been fine. Merlin had secrets too, the kind he intended to keep tucked away until the end of his days – preferably long after that, if fate allowed. But this was about Gwen. or; Where Merlin finds out about Gwens' secret, and it might change everything he and Arthur know about themselves and their feelings towards one another (along some other encounters). (I'm updating the older chapters as it doesn't quite fit my writing style anymore. But nothing about the story changed :) )

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,592Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 31

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 337,511Chapters: 72/110Kudos: 3,288

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Dissonance
entry.summary:
Author: BackToDust

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,584Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 205

Summary: Arthur survived the battle of Camlann. Long live the King. But since his return, a door in his mind and heart has been opened. The bond between him and Merlin is shifting, and so is the balance of the universe. A new prophecy begins to take shape, one that reveals the missing note of a broken song. More chapters and tags to come.

entry.title: Soldier, Servant, Poet, King
entry.summary:
Author: Grammar_Beane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 47,324Chapters: 24/24Kudos: 223

Summary: Arthur and Merlin were just going on a hunting trip. It was meant to be a nice, easy trip through the woods around Camelot. It ended with them being chased by an unknown monster into an unknown cave, stepping out into an unknown world. Maybe the weird bard and the magic monster hunter they found in the woods could help? Jaskier and Geralt were on their way north for the winter—Jaskier to Oxenfurt, Geralt to Kaer Morhen. But they were still a ways away when two odd men claiming to be from a place called “Camelot” stumbled into them. Geralt immediately learned Merlin has magic, and Jaskier could see the chemistry between the pair from a mile away. Arthur wanted to get back to Camelot.Merlin wanted to get back to Camelot, and stay alive while his magic seemed intent on acting bizarre.Geralt wanted to travel with Jaskier.Jaskier wanted to travel with Geralt, and get those two idiots to confess everything. It took some time, but they all got what they wanted. More or less.

entry.title: Just a Little Fun
entry.summary:
Author: THELASTDRAGON

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,664Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Merlin arrives in Camelot and meets an arrogant, infuriatingly attractive knight. Who he thinks is just some Noble's son who wants to get dicked down by a pheasant. While Merlin is happy to play along - nothing in Camelot is ever what it seems—and his simple fun is about to get so much more complicated.

entry.title: Cheekbones & Consequences
entry.summary:
Author: amariis28

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,362Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 19

Summary: This wasn’t supposed to happen.At all.But Merlin could never help it, could he?He just had to stick his nose somewhere it was never needed.Now, he was suffering the consequences.He’s been in this position before though. Many times. In fact, if he could recall the number of times he’d begrudgingly sat on this very desk, that had his initials carved from the amount of times he’s been there, he wouldn’t have enough fingers to put down. That includes his toes too.Right next to him, sat Gwaine. Of course, triumphant marked his face. He seemed to enjoy this a lot.*[work in progress]

entry.title: Different Destiny: The Outlaw Prince
entry.summary:
Author: tansyuduri

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,357Chapters: 21/25Kudos: 227

Summary: When Merlin's magic is exposed shortly before season 2 starts, the path of destiny starts changing forever. Now on the run with Arthur, Morgana, and Gwen. Merlin hopes to convince Arthur that magic is totally good instead of him and Morgana just being an exception. Morgana, meanwhile, hopes to convince him to usurp his father. As allies are gathered and Arthur realizes the injustice in his kingdom, it looks more and more like he will have to act in a drastic way. A way he dreads.   Meanwhile, Arthur and Merlin are growing closer and closer and might just have feelings for each other. Something they probably should be better about realizing, considering the example of Gwen and Morgana right next to them.   In a land of myth and a time of magic, the destiny of a great kingdom now rests on the shoulders of four, their names: Merlin, Arthur, Guinevere, and Morgana

entry.title: it’s not easy being green
entry.summary:
Author: everydayistuesday

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,234Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 72

Summary: “He needs a prince to kiss him,” Leon says. “That would be you,” Gwaine provides unhelpfully. “Best pucker up, Princess.”

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)

entry.title: The Lies We Tell
entry.summary:
Author: Saladscream

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,967Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 180

Summary: It’s a lie. An outrageous, bare-faced, slanderous, shameless lie. A calumny. A smear on his honour. Merlin isn’t a lightweight, dammit. It takes more than a couple of miserly pints of beer to send him rolling under the table, and anyone who dares to say anything to the contrary is a brazen liar and an unabashed twat.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)

entry.title: The Sun Is Also A Star
entry.summary:
Author: CaughtInTheRa1n

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,930Chapters: 21/21Kudos: 4

Summary: With King Uther’s health rapidly deteriorating, Arthur Pendragon must do what all kings before him have done: go on a quest to prove himself the next worthy leader of Camelot. But when his quest leads him to a mysterious tower with a rumored dark past, Arthur begins to question the things he’s been told. There are stories about what lurks in the tower outside of Gorra. Some say it is the wellspring of evil itself; the beating heart of all magic. Others claim to have glimpsed a twisted creature through its single dirty window. They say whatever lives there is cursed—trapped forever in a labyrinth of rooms, and if you go in, you don’t come out. Nobody ever comes out. Arthur is sure they’re all old wives’ tales. The building is clearly abandoned, after all. But as Arthur delves further into the tower’s past, nothing is quite as it seems. Is this place truly home to a monster, or is there something else afoot? And who is the mysterious man who wanders its halls? Inspired by art by count-pudding . A merthur-shaped mystery for BBC Merlin Reverse Big Bang.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,770Chapters: 60/?Kudos: 31

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: The Shape of Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Joy_peace

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,109Chapters: 4/8Kudos: 31

Summary: Arthur has always trusted Merlin—just not for the reasons Merlin thinks. When Camelot’s peace fractures and something ancient begins to stir, secrets long held in silence begin to surface…and not all of them belong to Merlin.
